cases.title: Flowchart decision baseline
cases.source:
flowchart TD
  A[Start] --> B{Decision}
  B -->|Yes| C[OK]
  B -->|No| D[Retry]

cases.title: Flowchart with subgraph
cases.source:
flowchart LR
  subgraph Client
    A[Browser]
    B[Cache]
  end
  subgraph Server
    C[API]
    D[(Database)]
  end
  A --> C
  C --> D
  C --> B

cases.title: Notion-style HTML break labels
cases.source:
flowchart TD A["Request
with line break"] --> B["Response
with another break"]

cases.title: Markdown labels
cases.source: flowchart TD A["**Bold** request"] --> B["code label"]

cases.title: Sequence baseline
cases.source:
sequenceDiagram
  participant User
  participant Kern
  User->>Kern: Open file
  Kern-->>User: Rendered document

cases.title: Sequence notes, loop, and alternatives
cases.source:
sequenceDiagram
  participant User
  participant Kern
  participant Cache
  User->>Kern: Open file
  activate Kern
  Kern->>Cache: Lookup render cache
  alt cache hit
    Cache-->>Kern: SVG
  else cache miss
    Kern->>Kern: Render native fallback
  end
  loop visible diagrams
    Kern-->>User: Draw block
  end
  Note over User,Kern: Should match official Mermaid semantics
  deactivate Kern

cases.title: Class diagram baseline
State diagram baseline
cases.source:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> Idle
  Idle --> Loading: open
  Loading --> Editing: loaded
  Editing --> Saving: save
  Saving --> Editing: done

cases.title: ER diagram baseline
cases.source:
erDiagram
  USER ||--o{ DOCUMENT : owns
  DOCUMENT ||--o{ BLOCK : contains
  USER {
    string id
    string name
  }

cases.title: Gantt baseline
cases.source:
gantt
  title Kern release plan
  dateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD
  section Rendering
  Corpus design :done, 2026-06-21, 1d
  Official renderer POC :active, 2026-06-22, 3d

cases.title: Git graph baseline
cases.source:
gitGraph
  commit id: "base"
  branch theme
  checkout theme
  commit id: "prototype"
  checkout main
  merge theme

cases.title: Mindmap baseline
cases.source:
mindmap
  root((Kern))
    Native
      TextKit
      AppKit
    Rich blocks
      Math
      Mermaid

cases.title: Timeline baseline
cases.source:
timeline
  title Kern renderer milestones
  2026-06-21 : Corpus eval
  2026-06-22 : Official renderer prototype
  2026-06-23 : A/B decision

cases.title: User journey baseline
cases.source:
journey
  title Editing a large Markdown file
  section Open
    Select file: 5: User
    Render WYSIWYG: 4: Kern
  section Edit
    Toggle checkbox: 5: User
    Save automatically: 5: Kern

cases.title: Invalid Mermaid should not crash
cases.source:
flowchart TD
  A -->
  this is not valid official syntax [[[
